LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GRANITE ROCK COMPANY'S MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETLEMENT IS GRANTED. GRAHAM CONTRACTORS HAS THE BURDEN TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THE SETTLEMENT IS "OUT OF THE BALLPARK." SEE CCP 877.6(D). GRAHAM CONTRACTORS FAILS TO MEET THAT BURDEN AND SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE SUPPORTS THE FINDING THAT THE SETTLEMENT IS IN GOOD FAITH. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders cross complaint(s) dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-16-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-19-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn For Determination Of Good Faith Setlement
Off Calendar Sep-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. LAWRENCE BRAGMAN, TEL. NO. 459-6060 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MATTHEW D. GIAMPAOLI OF THE LAMORE, BRAZIER & GIAMPAOLI, TEL. NO. (408) 280-6800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT GRANITE ROCK COMPANY;
ATTY. JILL B. NAIL OF THE LAW OFFICES OF BEVERLY E. NARAYAN, TEL. NO. 227-2371 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT GRAHAM CONTRACTORS, INCORPORATED.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT GRANITE ROCK COMPANY's Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Setlement is granted. Graham Contractors has the burden to demonstrate that the settlement is "out of the ballpark." See CCP 877.6(d). Graham Contractors fails to meet that burden and substantial evidence supports the finding that the settlement is in good faith. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
